title: Public Safety Service

The '''Public Safety Service''', or '''PSS''', was the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] that succeeded the [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The Public Safety Service was formed in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] by the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Head of State/Legends|head of state]], [[Diktat]]<ref name="XW:WG" /> [[Daclif Gallamby]],<ref name="AaC" /> to replace the prestigious [[Corellian Security Force]].<ref name="XW:WG" /> Following the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that supported the Diktat's regime began to fall apart. Without the direct protection of the Emperor, the Corellian government faltered.<ref name="AaC" /> The Diktat therefore dissolved the CorSec<ref name="XW:WG" /> that was far too honest and righteous<ref name="HG">''[[Hero's Guide]]''</ref> and allocated most of its resources to the new<ref name="XW:WG" /> Diktat-friendly Public Safety Service.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|143|Corellian Security Force (CorSec)}}</ref> Hence, this new political police was tasked with hunting the enemies of the Diktat in addition to its role as a security force.<ref name="IJ" /> Contrary to CorSec that was mostly independent from the government,<ref name="HG" /> the Public Safety Service was part of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].<ref name="AaC" /> PSS agents wore uniforms based upon those used by the Galactic Empire. However, the PSS was considered more interested in snooping and small and trivial matters than it was in policing. As it was put by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], "graffiti was obliterated before it had a chance to dry."<ref name="IJ" />

Years later, the Diktat's government collapsed and the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] was taken over by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] that appointed a [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] to oversee Corellia and the sector. The Public Safety Service was turned into a classical law enforcement agency but, since Imperial loyalists remained very common in Corellian military and security forces, Governor-General [[Micamberlecto]] did not put his trust in PSS agents for protecting him.<ref name="AaC" />

Eventually, the New Republic restored the Corellian Security Force.<ref name="TCSWE" /> However, the Public Safety Service was not immediately abolished and both CorSec and PSS coexisted during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="AoC2:JE" /><ref name="Recovery">''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]''</ref> In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the Yuuzhan Vong War, the PSS was deployed on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] in order to stop riots that emerged on the planet that protested the arrival of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Anakin Solo]].<ref name="AoC2:JE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Public Safety Service first appeared in the [[1995]] novel ''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''. In the book, it was known as both "Public Safety Service" and "Public Security Service."<ref name="AaC" /> Later novels and reference books systematically used Public Safety Service.<ref name="IJ" /><ref name="XW:WG" /><ref name="AoC2:JE" /><ref name="TCSWE" /><ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
